mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS plantId, p.name AS plantName, p.address AS location, p.district_code AS districtCode FROM plant p WHERE p.member_id = #{memberId} AND p.is_main = 1 AND p.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT pi.id AS plantId, COALESCE(pi.total_value, 0) AS currentPower, COALESCE(pi.efficiency, 0) AS efficiency FROM plant_info_view pi WHERE pi.id = #{plantId}
SELECT dw.sunrise AS sunrise, dw.sunset AS sunset FROM daily_weather dw WHERE dw.district_code = #{districtCode} AND dw.base_date = CURDATE()

SELECT wl.temperature FROM weather_log wl INNER JOIN ( SELECT district_code, MAX(base_time) AS max_time FROM weather_log WHERE district_code = #{districtCode} GROUP BY district_code ) latest ON wl.district_code = latest.district_code AND wl.base_time = latest.max_time
SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(r.gti), 0), 2) AS insolation FROM radiation_log r WHERE r.plant_id = #{plantId} AND DATE(r.base_time) = CURDATE()

SELECT i.plant_id AS plantId, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(dr.value_actual), 0), 2) AS dailyAccumulation, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(dr.value_expected), 0), 2) AS predGen FROM inverter i LEFT JOIN daily_report dr ON dr.inverter_id = i.id AND dr.base_date = CURDATE() WHERE i.plant_id = #{plantId} GROUP BY i.plant_id
SELECT i.id AS id, i.plant_id AS plantId, i.serial AS serial, i.status_code AS status FROM inverter i INNER JOIN plant p ON i.plant_id = p.id WHERE p.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY i.id ASC

SELECT HOUR(hr.base_time) AS hour, COALESCE(SUM(hr.value_actual), 0) AS value FROM hourly_report hr INNER JOIN inverter i ON hr.inverter_id = i.id WHERE i.plant_id = #{plantId} AND DATE(hr.base_time) = CURDATE() AND HOUR(hr.base_time) BETWEEN 6 AND 18 GROUP BY HOUR(hr.base_time) ORDER BY HOUR(hr.base_time)

SELECT HOUR(r.base_time) AS hour, COALESCE(AVG(r.gti), 0) AS value FROM radiation_log r WHERE r.plant_id = #{plantId} AND DATE(r.base_time) = CURDATE() AND HOUR(r.base_time) BETWEEN 6 AND 18 GROUP BY HOUR(r.base_time) ORDER BY HOUR(r.base_time)
